---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## User Story
As a **[user role]**, I want **[feature]** so that **[benefit]**.

Example:
As a **seller**, I want **to set weekly menu templates** so that **I don't have to recreate the same menu daily**.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this be implemented?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Target Role(s)
- [ ] Buyer
- [ ] Seller
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] All

## Priority
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (should have)
- [ ] High (must have for Phase 1)

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Large (> 3 days)

## Related Issues
- Relates to #123
- Similar to #456

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] I have clearly described the user benefit
- [ ] I have provided acceptance criteria
- [ ] This feature aligns with Phase 1 or future roadmap
